channel.title: Real PVA Shop
channel.description: Buy verified accounts and digital services

item.title: Google Reviews – Boost Your Business Reputation with Verified Feedback
item.description: Want to buy genuine Google reviews that actually stick? Our verified packages deliver real feedback from aged profiles — helping your business rank higher, earn trust & convert more customers.

item.title: Old Gmail Accounts – Aged & Verified Google Profiles for Professional Use
item.description: Looking for aged Gmail profiles with established trust scores? Our old Google accounts are pre-verified, recovery-secured, and ready for business outreach, automation testing & email workflow setup.

item.title: Tinder Account Packages – Verified Profiles for App Testing & QA
item.description: Need a Tinder profile for controlled testing or app behavior analysis? Our verified account packages are pre-configured, instantly delivered, and built for developers, QA teams & onboarding specialists. Starting from $13.00.
